name: Salesforce
what_it_does: Cloud CRM platform for sales, service, marketing, commerce, and analytics with a massive developer ecosystem

name: HubSpot
what_it_does: All-in-one CRM platform covering marketing, sales, service, CMS, and operations with date-versioned REST APIs

name: Pipedrive
what_it_does: Sales-focused CRM with pipeline management, deals, contacts, activities, and webhooks

name: Attio
what_it_does: Highly customizable, data-driven CRM with an App SDK, REST API, and native MCP for AI agents

name: Twenty
what_it_does: Open-source, self-hostable CRM built for AI agents with REST, GraphQL, webhooks, and native MCP support

name: Podio
what_it_does: Low-code work management platform where the entire frontend is built on the REST API, enabling full programmatic access
auth_methods: OAuth2 (server-side, client-side, username-password, app authentication flows)

name: Zoho CRM
what_it_does: Comprehensive CRM with metadata, entity CRUD, composite, bulk, notification, and SQL-like query APIs (COQL)

name: Close
what_it_does: Sales engagement CRM with leads, contacts, sequences, email/SMS outreach, webhooks, event log, and an official MCP server

name: Copper
what_it_does: Google Workspace-integrated CRM with REST API for contacts, deals, leads, projects, tasks, and activities
main_blocker: No MCP server exists yet; straightforward REST API with Postman collection makes building one feasible

name: DealCloud
what_it_does: Enterprise deal and relationship management platform (by Intapp) for private equity, investment banking, and capital markets
main_blocker: Gated enterprise sales process; requires paid contract and admin setup to obtain API credentials

name: Zendesk
what_it_does: Omnichannel customer service platform covering ticketing, help center, live chat, voice, sales CRM, and AI agents

name: Intercom
what_it_does: AI-first customer service platform with messenger, help desk, tickets, reporting, and Fin AI bot; broad developer platform

name: Freshdesk
what_it_does: Customer support help desk with tickets, contacts, agents, knowledge base, SLA, automations, and omnichannel support

name: Front
what_it_does: Collaborative communication platform unifying email, SMS, chat, and social into a shared inbox with an official MCP server (beta)

name: Pylon
what_it_does: B2B-focused support platform with omnichannel ticketing (Slack Connect, Email, Teams, Chat), AI agents, and customer portals
main_blocker: Narrow documented API surface focused on customers and issues; building a full toolkit would require expanding API coverage

name: LiveAgent
what_it_does: Multichannel help desk with ticketing, live chat, call center, knowledge base, and customer portal; v3 API actively developed
auth_methods: API Key (v1 and v3 separate keys)
main_blocker: No MCP server exists; v1 API is deprecated, v3 is actively developed with Swagger descriptor available for auto-generation

name: Plain
what_it_does: Modern B2B support platform with a GraphQL API that powers the entire UI, plus a dedicated MCP Server for AI agents

name: Help Scout
what_it_does: Customer support platform with shared inbox, knowledge base (Docs), chat, and Mailbox API 2.0 with OAuth2
main_blocker: No first-party MCP; community MCP server exists (drewburchfield) and StackOne offers a managed MCP wrapper

name: Gorgias
what_it_does: E-commerce-focused customer service platform with ticket management, automation, and integrations for Shopify and other platforms

name: Gladly
what_it_does: Conversation-centric customer service platform with REST API, App Platform for integrations, Chat SDK, and Help Center
main_blocker: No first-party MCP server; StackOne offers a third-party managed MCP wrapper with 65 actions

name: Slack
what_it_does: Enterprise team messaging platform with channels, apps, workflows, canvases, and both an official MCP server and MCP client (Slackbot as MCP client)

name: Twilio
what_it_does: Cloud communications platform for SMS, voice, video, email (SendGrid), WhatsApp, and customer engagement across channels
auth_methods: API Key (Account SID + Auth Token / API Key)

name: Zoho Cliq
what_it_does: Team messaging and collaboration platform with channels, direct messages, bots, slash commands, message cards, and database integration
main_blocker: No MCP server exists; well-documented REST API with OpenAPI spec available for auto-generation

name: Lark
what_it_does: All-in-one collaboration platform (messaging, calendar, docs, sheets, drive, meetings) with official OpenAPI MCP tool and SDKs in multiple languages

name: Pumble
what_it_does: Simple team chat application with a limited public API primarily for sending messages via API keys
main_blocker: Extremely limited API surface (primarily message sending); lacks CRUD for channels, users, threads, files etc. needed for a useful agent toolkit
